_meta.description: Agents update this file. Keep it as an observation map for implementation progress.

gemini_key_client_exposure.note: Gemini calls moved to server /api/validate endpoint; browser now calls backend and no longer reads API key.

input_query_sanitization.note: Added client/server input policies with length + character constraints, URL normalization, and clear 400 malformed-input errors.

http_security_headers.note: No API server configured with standard security headers and CORS restrictions.

real_data_provider.note: Accelerator list is static; no normalized funding-program source endpoint yet.

validation_resilience.note: Current validation depends on model output; no deterministic fallback checker.

freshness_persistence.note: No persisted cache of last verification run across sessions.

repo_hardening_docs.note: No SECURITY.md and contribution security policy in repo root.

ci_quality_gate.note: No CI workflow enforcing lint and build before merge.

cloudflare_link_slot.note: No deployment metadata for publishing live demo link on company site.

azure_free_credit_path.note: No documented path for free Azure credits and low-cost hosting setup.

env_contract.note: No explicit production env contract for frontend and backend split.
